products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Discover our full range of infant formulas and baby food products.

lactonicGold1.name: Lactonic Gold 1
lactonicGold1.description: A premium starter formula for babies from birth to 6 months, packed with over 40 carefully chosen nutrients to support brain development, a healthy immune system, and comfortable digestion.

lactonicGold2.name: Lactonic Gold 2
lactonicGold2.description: A follow-on formula for babies aged 6–12 months with over 40 key nutrients to support immunity, brain development, and healthy growth. Can also be mixed with cereals as your baby starts exploring new foods.

lactolacGold3.name: Lactolac Gold 3
lactolacGold3.description: A growing-up milk for toddlers aged 1–3 years with 40+ essential nutrients to support brain development, strong bones, and a healthy immune system at every active stage.

easeToGo1.name: Ease to Go 1
easeToGo1.description: A gentle starter formula for babies from birth to 6 months, specially designed to ease constipation and support comfortable digestion, while providing all the essential nutrients your baby needs.

easeToGo2.name: Ease to Go 2
easeToGo2.description: A follow-on formula for babies aged 6–12 months that helps relieve constipation and supports comfortable digestion, delivering balanced nutrition for healthy growth.

easeToGo3.name: Ease 2 Go 3
easeToGo3.description: A growing-up formula for toddlers aged 1–2 years that promotes comfortable, regular digestion and helps ease constipation, while providing balanced nutrition for active development.

lactonicAC.name: Lactonic AC Gold
lactonicAC.description: An anti-colic formula for babies with gas, bloating, and tummy discomfort. Uses gently processed proteins and a softer milk base to make every feed more comfortable, alongside key growth nutrients.

lactonicAR.name: Lactonic AR Gold
lactonicAR.description: An anti-regurgitation formula for babies who frequently spit up after feeding. Its naturally thickened texture helps keep milk down, keeping your baby comfortable and well-nourished.

lactonicHA1.name: Lactonic HA Plus 1
lactonicHA1.description: A hypoallergenic infant formula for babies from birth to 6 months who are at risk of allergy, used under medical supervision, for babies suffering from cow's milk protein allergies.

lactonicHA2.name: Lactonic HA Plus 2
lactonicHA2.description: A hypoallergenic follow-on formula for babies from 6 to 12 months with cow's milk protein sensitivity, used under medical supervision, for babies suffering from cow's milk protein allergies.

lactonicHA3.name: Lactonic HA Plus 3
lactonicHA3.description: A hypoallergenic growing-up formula for toddlers from 1 to 3 years with cow's milk protein sensitivity, used under medical supervision, for babies suffering from cow's milk protein allergies.

lactonicLF.name: Lactonic LF
lactonicLF.description: A lactose-free formula for babies who have difficulty digesting regular milk. Helps restore fluids and key minerals while providing essential vitamins and nutrients for healthy growth. Use under medical guidance.

lactonic3Fruits.name: 3 Fruits
lactonic3Fruits.description: A smooth fruit puree blending three natural fruits, gluten-free with no added sugar, ideal for babies from 4 months.

lactonic4FruitsCookie.name: 4 Fruits with Cookie
lactonic4FruitsCookie.description: A tasty blend of four fruits with soft cookie pieces, rich in fibre and Vitamin C, suitable for babies from 6 months.

lactonicBabyKabsah.name: Baby Kabsah
lactonicBabyKabsah.description: A savoury steamed meal inspired by classic Kabsah, low in fat and salt with a good source of protein, for babies from 6 months.

lactonicFruitCereals.name: Fruit and Cereals
lactonicFruitCereals.description: A wholesome blend of fruit and cereals with no added sugar, gluten-free and enriched with Vitamin C, for babies from 6 months.

lactonicVegetableBeef.name: Vegetables with Beef
lactonicVegetableBeef.description: A nutritious steamed meal combining tender beef with fresh vegetables, gluten-free and low in fat, for babies from 6 months.

fiveCerealsHoneyMilk.name: 5 Cereals + Honey + Milk
fiveCerealsHoneyMilk.description: A warm, nourishing blend of 5 cereals with real honey and milk to support your baby's daily growth. Packed with 12 vitamins, Iron, Calcium, and Zinc. Made with clean, non-GMO ingredients. From 12 months.

milkWithRice.name: Milk with Rice
milkWithRice.description: Your baby's perfect first cereal — a gentle, creamy blend of rice and milk that's easy to digest. Packed with 12 vitamins, Iron, Calcium, and Zinc. Made in Europe to high safety standards. From 4 months.

milkWheat.name: Milk + Wheat
milkWheat.description: A filling wheat and milk cereal packed with energy for your baby's active days. Easy to digest and enriched with vitamins, Iron, and Zinc. Made in Europe with non-GMO ingredients. From 6 months.

lactomom.name: Lactomom
lactomom.description: A complete formula to support you through pregnancy and breastfeeding. Gives you energy, supports your baby's brain and eye development, and keeps you healthy — with Iron, Folic Acid, DHA, Calcium, Vitamin D, Choline, and Taurine all in one.

lactonicGranules.name: Lactonic Granules
lactonicGranules.description: A natural herbal supplement for breastfeeding mothers. Helps your body produce more milk, supports your health while nursing, and eases tummy discomfort for both you and your baby.

lactonicRabbit.name: Lactonic Rabbit — Calcium + Vit D
lactonicRabbit.description: A yummy calcium gummy that helps build strong bones and healthy teeth. With Vitamin D3 to help the body absorb calcium better. For children from 2 years.

lactonicOcean.name: Lactonic Ocean — Omega 3
lactonicOcean.description: An Omega-3 gummy with DHA and EPA to help your child think clearly, stay focused, and see well. Made from pure, high-quality fish oil. For children from 2 years.

lactonicBear.name: Lactonic Bear — Multivitamins
lactonicBear.description: A daily multivitamin gummy to fill nutrition gaps and help your child grow and stay full of energy. Vitamins release gradually so the body absorbs them properly. For children from 2 years.

lactonicLion.name: Lactonic Lion — Vit C + Zinc
lactonicLion.description: A Vitamin C and Zinc gummy to boost your child's immune system and help them stay healthy. Fast-absorbing and gentle on the stomach. For children from 2 years.

meta.title: About Us
meta.description: BioHealth Prodentia (BHP) is a Canadian multinational delivering scientifically advanced infant nutrition and healthcare solutions.

hero.body: A Canadian multinational delivering scientifically advanced infant nutrition and healthcare solutions. We combine molecular innovation with GMP/EU-compliant manufacturing to set new standards in neonatal care.

visionMission.heading: Guided by Purpose
visionMission.visionText: To provide communities with exceptional products through manufacturing excellence and GMP/EU-compliant innovation.
visionMission.missionText: To maximize user outcomes by offering high-quality, reliable infant nutrition in partnership with global health professionals.
visionMission.videoQuote: Leap to the Future of Infant Nutrition
visionMission.partnerSub: Industrias Lácteas Asturianas S.A. — advanced nutritional R&D facility

hero.title: Successful Partnership
hero.subtitle: Join BioHealth Prodentia's trusted global network and help bring EU-manufactured, scientifically formulated Lactonic Gold infant nutrition to families worldwide.

intro.heading: A Canadian Multinational Built on Science & Trust
intro.body: BioHealth Prodentia (BHP) is a Canadian multinational company delivering high-quality infant nutrition and healthcare solutions. Founded in 2013 and headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, we focus on innovation, technology, and partnerships to promote early-stage development and wellness. Our Lactonic Gold products are manufactured by Industrias Lácteas Asturianas S.A. (Reny Picot) in Navia, Spain — under full GMP/EU compliance, with 138 Bacteriological and Organoleptic Tests per batch.

items.title: Exclusive Distribution
items.body: BHP operates through exclusive regional distributors with defined territorial scope, roles, and commercialization responsibilities — following the proven model of Dallah Pharma (Saudi Arabia), Seucal Pharma (Egypt), and Boushahri Group (Kuwait).

items.title: New Market Entry
items.body: Pioneer Lactonic Gold in our active pipeline markets: Jordan, UAE, Pakistan, Mexico, and China. BHP provides regulatory dossiers, product registration support, warehousing and logistics capability confirmation, and proven commercial frameworks.

items.title: Agency Partnership
items.body: As part of our Distribution Expansion strategic pillar, BHP actively seeks agency partners to deepen market penetration across MENA, Africa, and Latin America — the primary growth corridors for our 2026–2029 roadmap.

items.title: Diverse Product Portfolio
items.body: 12 specialized infant formula products covering 0–36 months, powered by the latest EU manufacturing technologies with 40+ nutrients including DHA — manufactured by Reny Picot in Navia, Asturias, Spain.

items.title: Efficient Regulatory Affairs
items.body: A dedicated regulatory affairs lead oversees product registration, labeling compliance, and market authorization in every active country. Full regulatory dossiers and technical datasheets are available upon request.

items.title: Skilled Marketing Team
items.body: Our marketing team drives effective planning, promotion, and distribution — supplemented by a partner network of 200+ field personnel across MENA and a dedicated Sales & Marketing department.

items.title: Strong Industry Relationships
items.body: BHP maintains strong relationships with principals, key clients, and institutional stakeholders — built on an active commercial track record since 2018 across Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Canada, and Egypt.

cta.heading: Ready to Partner with Us?
cta.body: Send us a message and our Business Development team will get back to you within 48 hours.
cta.hint: Choose your email client — we'll pre-fill everything for you.
cta.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your organisation and the market you represent…
